reference: Dear patient, you have muscle spasms due to lifting heavy weights. Avoid forward bending and weight lifting for three days. Start taking the combination of Diclofenac and Thiocolchicoside twice a day for pain relief. Apply hot water fomentation locally to your back. You will be fine within a few days. All the best.
text: Dear patient, you have muscle spasms due to lifting heavy weights. Avoid forward bending and weightlifting for 3 days. Start taking the combination of diclofenac and thiocholchicozide twice a day for pain relief. Apply hot water fermentation locally to your back. You will be fine within a few days. All the best.
